expo.name: PublisHearts POS
expo.description: PublisHearts mobile point-of-sale app for cash checkout, browser checkout, and Stripe Terminal Tap to Pay.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location access is required to accept in-person payments.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Bluetooth is used to connect to supported Stripe readers.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Location access is required to accept in-person Tap to Pay payments.
plugins.bluetoothPeripheralPermission: Bluetooth may be used to connect to supported Stripe readers.
plugins.bluetoothAlwaysUsagePermission: Bluetooth may be used to connect to supported Stripe readers.
plugins.localNetworkUsagePermission: Local network access can be used to connect to supported Stripe readers.
